sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 12.96 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.12)

statement.latex: Find a non-empty Fitting class${ F}$and a non-soluble finite group$G$such that$G$has no${ F}$-injectors. { L.\,A.\,Shemetkov} Found by E.\,Salomon (Mainz Univ., unpublished); his example is presented in \,7.1 of (A.\,Ballester-Bolinches, L.\,M.\,Ezquerro, Classes of finite groups, Springer, 2006).

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
